/// Hardware Abstraction Layer for Quantum Backends.

use fusion_core::types::quantum::{QuantumCircuit, QuantumState};
use fusion_std::error::StdResult;

pub trait QuantumBackend {
    fn name(&self) -> &str;
    fn run(&self, circuit: &QuantumCircuit) -> StdResult<QuantumState>;
}

pub struct LocalSimulator;

impl QuantumBackend for LocalSimulator {
    fn name(&self) -> &str {
        "Fusion Sparse Simulator (CPU)"
    }

    fn run(&self, circuit: &QuantumCircuit) -> StdResult<QuantumState> {
        // In Phase 3 (Core), we added a basic simulate() method.
        // The SDK wraps this in a consistent Backend API.
        Ok(circuit.simulate())
    }
}

// Future: IBMQBackend, IonQBackend struct definitions would go here.
